content.situation: 你的主管确认了你的请假申请，你准备结束对话并表达感谢。
content.speakerText: Your request is approved. Let me know if you need anything before you leave.
content.speakerTextCn: 你的申请已批准。离开前如果需要什么尽管告诉我。

blanks.answer: I'll be sure to catch up when I'm back.
options: I'll be sure to catch up when I'm back.
I will send you the report tomorrow.
I hope you have a good day.

content.hint: 表达感谢后，用一句温和的未来承诺收尾，体现专业和礼貌。
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌结束对话的常见表达结构

content.situation: 同事确认你的请假已录入系统，你准备礼貌地道别。
content.speakerText: All set in the calendar. Have a relaxing time!
content.speakerTextCn: 已录入日程，祝你好好放松！

blanks.answer: I’ll see you when I return.
options: I’ll see you when I return.
See you later, don’t work too hard.
That’s great, I’ll call you later.

content.hint: 道别时应使用清晰、积极的回归承诺，避免模糊或无关的回应。
content.knowledgePoint: 职场中确认后道别的标准句型

content.situation: 经理确认你的请假获批，你希望表达感谢并结束对话，保持专业与温暖。
content.speakerText: Approved! Let me know if anything changes.
content.speakerTextCn: 批准了！如果有什么变动告诉我。

options: I’ll fix the issue before I go.

content.hint: 在感谢之后，用一句温暖但不冗长的道别语收尾，体现人情味与专业性。
content.knowledgePoint: 表达感谢后自然过渡到道别的常用表达
